landing.title: Bookla
landing.description: Use the exact link a business shared with you to open their booking page.
landing.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find what you're looking for.

service.title: Pick a service
service.subtitle: Choose what you'd like to book.
service.empty: This business has no active services yet.

staff.title: Pick a staff member
staff.subtitle: Who would you like to see?

date.title: Pick a date
date.subtitle: Choose any day in the next two weeks.

slot.title: Pick a time
slot.subtitle: The service takes {{minutes}} min. Pick a start time:
slot.empty: No times available on this day. Try another date.

form.title: Your details
form.subtitle: We'll use this to confirm your booking.

errors.generic: Could not create the booking. Try again.
errors.slotTaken: That time was just taken. Please pick another.
errors.invalid: Please check the details and try again.
errors.blocked: This phone can't book at this business right now. Please contact them directly.

confirmation.title: Booking confirmed
confirmation.subtitle: Here are the details. Keep this link for your records.
confirmation.notFoundDescription: This link may be stale or incorrect.
